explanation: This is the original command and will trigger the Sigma rule as a true positive.
The '-urlcache' flag is substituted with the equivalent short option '-u', which is valid syntax for certutil and should still trigger the rule.
Quotes are inserted around the URL to test parsing behavior, but the command remains valid and should still trigger the rule.
The order of the '-split' and '-f' flags is changed. Certutil accepts reordered arguments in some cases, and this should still trigger the rule.
